'''''Destion''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by [[Mugaari]] [[Mugaari pirates|pirates]]. It was part of an arms deal between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the pirates in a [[Mugaari cargo loading area|cargo loading area]] located in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] learned of this deal and [[Battle of the Tungra sector|attacked]]. The transport, along with [[Prince (starship)|''Prince'']] and [[Dawn (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|''Dawn'']], was destroyed in the battle while attempting to attack the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
